top_signals.title: CHART: Copper price surge mints 23 new unicorn mines
top_signals.summary: The ranks of copper mining’s answer to Silicon Valley's $1 billion startup unicorns swell to 75.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: New lawsuit against Trump's DOJ 'lawfare' fund
top_signals.summary: President Trump droppped his $10 billion lawsuit against the IRS in exchange for the DOJ creating a $1.8 billion fund to compensate alleged "lawfare" victims.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
